summary: Comprehensive testing completed for 3 new features: 1) Premium status sync endpoint, 2) MongoDB food database migration (85 foods), 3) Offline caching. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Settings page shows Offline Cache section with Clear button working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/payments/user/{user_id}/premium-status returns is_premium: false for non-existing users
Premium status response has correct structure: is_premium, purchased_at, session_id
Premium status endpoint handles various user ID formats
GET /api/foods returns all 85 foods from MongoDB
Food items have correct structure (id, name, category, safety_level, description, nutrition_note)
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from food responses
GET /api/foods/{id} returns single food from MongoDB (tested with Salmon id:1)
GET /api/foods/{id} returns 404 for non-existent food
GET /api/foods/search?q=salmon searches MongoDB correctly
GET /api/foods/search?q=Dairy searches by category correctly
GET /api/foods/search?q= (empty) returns all 85 foods
GET /api/categories returns 9 categories sorted alphabetically
POST /api/foods/personalized works with MongoDB data (85 foods)
Personalized foods with health conditions (anemia) returns recommended foods
GET /api/foods/category/Dairy returns dairy foods from MongoDB
GET /api/foods/safety/safe returns safe foods
GET /api/foods/safety/limit returns limit foods
GET /api/foods/safety/avoid returns exactly 13 avoid foods
GET /api/foods/safety/invalid returns 400 error
Frontend: Onboarding generates user ID in format user_{timestamp}_{random9chars}
Frontend: Settings page displays Offline Cache section with Database icon
Frontend: Cache stats display (items cached, KB storage used)
Frontend: Clear button clears all cache entries from localStorage
Frontend: Categories are cached with 24-hour expiry
Frontend: User profile displays age and trimester correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Premium status endpoint properly queries payment_transactions collection for paid status
MongoDB foods_collection properly excludes _id using projection {'_id': 0}
Offline caching implemented with correct CACHE_KEYS and CACHE_DURATIONS
UserContext syncPremiumStatus() called on load when user has ID
User ID generation format: user_{timestamp}_{random9chars} is properly unique
test_credentials: No credentials needed - localStorage-based user management
seed_data_creation: 85 foods seeded to MongoDB on server startup (verified in logs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features verified: 1) Premium status endpoint at /api/payments/user/{user_id}/premium-status returns is_premium based on paid transactions. 2) Foods migrated to MongoDB - all 85 foods returned from foods_collection. 3) Offline caching - localStorage with prefix 'whattoeat_cache_' stores categories (foods not cached by default since personalized view is used). Cache durations: SHORT=1h, MEDIUM=6h, LONG=24h, WEEK=7d. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_verified.mongodb_food_migration: WORKING - 85 foods stored in MongoDB foods_collection
features_verified.food_search: WORKING - MongoDB regex search on name, category, description
features_verified.categories_from_mongodb: WORKING - MongoDB distinct query returns 9 sorted categories
features_verified.offline_caching_frontend: WORKING - localStorage cache with stats and clear button
features_verified.premium_sync_on_load: IMPLEMENTED - UserContext calls syncPremiumStatus on load
